user_prompt: X3 mobile game activity background art, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant fantasy colors, soft cinematic lighting, clean focal composition, high detail. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving theme (NOT a dark abyss, NOT lovecraftian, NOT gloomy). Palette: ocean blue, light cyan, teal-green, treasure gold, pearl white, warm sunlight orange. Motifs: light caustics / god-rays through water, rising bubbles, fish schools, coral, pearls, seashells. Use reference image 1 ONLY for the spatial composition / framing / where focal subjects sit (ERASE its summer colors, theme and any UI). Use reference image 2 for the deep-sea palette and motif. Scene: bright shallow ocean seen from above with sailing routes drawn on the water, small tropical islands and a half-sunken treasure shipwreck, coral reefs around the edges; keep the CENTER area calm and open (a fortune wheel will sit there). Output ONLY the painted background scene. NO UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO reward panels, NO progress bars, NO frames, NO watermark.
